response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the resume shows minimal alignment with the core requirements of this role. There is no demonstrated experience with IDE internals, language tooling, Kotlin, or the Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate ecosystem. Java is listed only as a skill with limited project-level use (robotic arms, mobile orchestration at Altom 2016-2018), and recent work has been TypeScript/Node.js focused. The deep JVM expertise central to this position is absent.
strengths: Strong track record on complex, large-scale systems at Meta and Google
Experience building developer tooling and contributing to a C IDE (LabWindows/CVI) at National Instruments
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testable architecture, public talks
concerns: No Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience shown
Minimal recent Java work and no Kotlin experience listed
No demonstrated IDE internals or language tooling experience beyond brief C/C++ IDE component work a decade ago

key_factors.factor: Senior engineer at top-tier companies with strong systems background
